summary: W1469 refines the W1468 W987 construction by replacing the W973 closed-embedding closedness provider with the W718 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component provider and the W519 mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding provider. It reconstructs W973 from those two fields, feeds the resulting W1468 input, and reassembles W945, W730, W986, and W987 while preserving the closedness fields, primitive target fields, reconstructed localized right adjoint, boundary relation, and target/endpoint projections. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1469 constructs W987 from raw boundary fields, raw relation fields, target-difference surjectivity and target-codomain compact no-univ membership primitive families, W718 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component data, W519 mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding data, normalized fixed-target fields, source-triangulation fields, endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields, localized right-adjoint object and morphism maps plus identity and composition laws, localized adjunction unit/counit component and naturality fields, localized adjunction left/right triangle component identity fields, unit-mapping-cone kernel/cokernel-top fields, and unit-mapping-cone iso hom/inv/identity fields rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1469 raw W716/W717 fields, target-difference surjectivity primitive family, target-codomain compact no-univ membership primitive family, W718 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component provider, W519 mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding provider, normalized-lift-blueprint, fixed-target uniqueness, source-pretriangulated, source-triangulated, triangle-completion, endpoint closed-embedding, endpoint open-map, endpoint cokernel-top, endpoint kernel-equality, localized right-adjoint object map, localized right-adjoint morphism map, localized right-adjoint identity law, localized right-adjoint composition law, localized adjunction unit component family, localized adjunction unit naturality, localized adjunction counit component family, localized adjunction counit naturality, localized adjunction left triangle component identity, localized adjunction right triangle component identity, unit-mapping-cone model, unit-mapping-cone closed-embedding, unit-mapping-cone open-map, unit-mapping-cone cokernel-top, unit-mapping-cone kernel-equality, unit-mapping-cone iso hom, unit-mapping-cone iso inv, unit-mapping-cone iso hom-inv, and unit-mapping-cone iso inv-hom inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
